folio.label: 105r
folio.l: ¢ This storie is seid , nat for that wyues shulde
Folwe Grisilde , as in humilitee
For it were importable , thougú they wold
But for that euäy wygút , in his degree
Shulde be constaunt , in aduersitee
As was Grisilde , therfore Petrak wrytetú
This storie , whicú witú heye stile , he endytetú
¢ For sithe a womman , was so pacient
Vn to a mortal man , wel more wewe ougút
Resceyuen al in gree , that god vs sent
For gret skyl is , he preeue that he wrougút
But he ne temptetú noman , that he bougút
As seitú Seynt Iame , if ©e his pistel rede
He preeuetú folk al day , it is no drede
¢ And suffretú vs , as for oure exercise
Witú sharpe skorges , and aduersitee
Ful oft to be bete , in sondry wyse
Nat for to knowe , oure wyl , for certis he
Er we were born~ , knew al oure freelete
And for oure best , is al his gouänaunce
Lat vs thanne lyue , in vertuous suffraunce
¢ But oo word lordynggis , herkenetú or I go
It were ful hard , to fynde now a dayes
In al a Toun , Grisildis thre or twoo
For if æat they were put , to swicú assayes
The gold of hem , hatú now so bad a layes
Witú bras , that thougú the coyne be fair at eye
It wolde rather breste a two , than plye
¢ For whicú here , for the wyues loue of Bathe
Whos lyf , and al hire secte , god mayntene
In heigú maistrie , and elles were it skathe
I wol witú lusty hert , fressú and grene
Seyn ©ow a songö , to glade ©ow I wene
And late vs stynt , of ernestful matere
Herkenetú my songö , that seitú in this manere

note.notetxt: 1176Note the final lines. They seem crammed in.ODR
